title: Attach images to chat support
excerpt: When contacting support via chat, please allow the sending of scraans. By pasting images into the chat. Now we have to take a screen, save it on the computer and then send it to support. That’s a lot of wasted time.

posts.author: Arek (Arkadiusz)
posts.cookedHtml: When contacting support via chat, please allow the sending of scraans. By pasting images into the chat. Now we have to take a screen, save it on the computer and then send it to support. That’s a lot of wasted time.
